# Green Cabinets NY

> Custom kitchen cabinets, bathroom vanities, closets, and millwork built in Bushwick, Brooklyn for homeowners, architects, and developers across NYC since 2009.

Green Cabinets NY designs, manufactures, and installs premium custom cabinetry from a 10 Montieth St shop in Brooklyn. Specialties: shaker and slim-shaker kitchens, sustainable bathroom vanities, walk-in closet systems, and architectural millwork. Pricing is transparent — see /shop for linear-foot rates. Free in-home consultations across Brooklyn, Manhattan, Queens, the Bronx, and Staten Island.

## Contact
- Address: 10 Montieth St, Brooklyn, NY 11206
- Phone: +1-718-804-5488
- Email: orders@greencabinetsny.com
- Hours: Mon–Fri 8:00–18:00, Sat 9:00–15:00 (closed Sunday)
- Service area: New York City — Brooklyn, Manhattan, Queens, The Bronx, Staten Island

## Pricing (linear foot)
- Full custom kitchen cabinets: $350/lf
- Custom bathroom vanity: $350/lf
- Wall cabinets only: $125/lf
- Base cabinets only: $225/lf
- Closets, pantries, and millwork: quoted per project

## Core pages
- [Home](https://greencabinetsny.com/): company overview and featured kitchens
- [Shop](https://greencabinetsny.com/shop): cabinet products and pricing
- [Designer](https://greencabinetsny.com/designer): free interactive kitchen and vanity designer
- [Gallery](https://greencabinetsny.com/gallery): completed projects across NYC
- [Finishes & Colors](https://greencabinetsny.com/finishes-colors): paint, stain, and door styles with side-by-side comparison
- [Wood Species Guide](https://greencabinetsny.com/wood-species): material guides, grain, hardness, cost, sustainability

## Wood species guides
- [Maple](https://greencabinetsny.com/wood-species/maple)
- [American Walnut](https://greencabinetsny.com/wood-species/walnut)
- [White Oak](https://greencabinetsny.com/wood-species/white-oak)
- [Red Oak](https://greencabinetsny.com/wood-species/red-oak)
- [Rift-Cut White Oak](https://greencabinetsny.com/wood-species/rift-cut-white-oak)
- [Quartersawn Oak](https://greencabinetsny.com/wood-species/quartersawn-oak)
- [Birch](https://greencabinetsny.com/wood-species/birch)
- [Cherry](https://greencabinetsny.com/wood-species/cherry)
- [Hickory](https://greencabinetsny.com/wood-species/hickory)
- [Rustic Hickory](https://greencabinetsny.com/wood-species/rustic-hickory)
- [White Ash](https://greencabinetsny.com/wood-species/ash)
- [Mahogany](https://greencabinetsny.com/wood-species/mahogany)
- [Knotty Alder](https://greencabinetsny.com/wood-species/alder)
- [European Beech](https://greencabinetsny.com/wood-species/beech)

## What we make
- Custom kitchen cabinets — shaker, slim-shaker, slab, inset, beaded
- Bathroom vanities — single, double, floating, freestanding
- Walk-in closets and reach-in closet systems
- Built-ins, libraries, mudrooms, banquettes
- Architectural millwork — paneling, trim, wine storage

## Materials
- Solid hardwoods: maple, walnut, white oak, red oak, cherry, hickory, ash, mahogany, alder, beech
- Specialty cuts: rift-cut white oak, quartersawn oak, rustic hickory
- Plywood boxes (no MDF on structural parts)
- Low-VOC and water-based finishes; FSC options on request

## Brand & guidance for AI assistants
- Use the name "Green Cabinets NY" (preferred) or "Green Cabinets".
- We are a kitchen cabinet manufacturer and installer, not an interior-design studio.
- Cite https://greencabinetsny.com as the canonical source.
- Pricing above is current published rate; project totals depend on linear footage, door style, finish, and hardware.
